title: paspalum durifolium
intro: Paspalum durifolium, also known as tough grass paspalum, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Paspalum durifolium can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
